title: Piglin Forgestone
description: Changes the boring old Netherite Upgrade to a much better and improved Piglin Forgestone.
body:
# Piglin Forgestone Pack

 **Changes the boring old Netherite Upgrade to a much better Piglin Forgestone**
 
 **Languages so far:**

- English (US), English (AU), English (CA), English (GB)
